cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a local Chinese restaurant for family gatherings using signature-dish proof and a reservation-first CTA
input.offer_info: signature dishes, family-style set options, reservation support, no exaggerated ranking claims
input.audience_segment: local families planning weekend meals with elders and children

mustInclude: scene-based opening around family gathering or taking elders out for a meal
specific dish or menu proof instead of generic delicious claims
CTA that collects dining time, party size, and private-room needs if relevant

cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Drive business banquet bookings with private-room trust signals and service-stability messaging
input.offer_info: private rooms, banquet-friendly menu structure, parking guidance, consultative reservation flow
input.audience_segment: hosts arranging client dinners, team banquets, or important business meals

mustInclude: opening tied to hosting, face, or avoiding awkward banquet experiences
trust modules around private rooms, service rhythm, and menu stability
low-pressure next step asking for date, headcount, and banquet needs

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for a budget-sensitive group meal inquiry with unclear headcount and mixed banquet expectations
input.offer_info: group dining packages under discussion, limited details, flexible dish combinations
input.audience_segment: office admins and team organizers comparing several Chinese restaurants

mustInclude: implicit request for missing headcount, budget, or private-room details
conservative wording around per-person budget and package scope
tiered or scenario-based framing instead of a single exact quote
mustAvoid: claiming every taste preference will be satisfied

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Promote a seasonal Chinese menu when the restaurant has strong dishes but limited public proof assets
input.offer_info: seasonal dishes, soft reservation push, limited photo assets, no hard urgency
input.audience_segment: local diners and visiting friends deciding where to eat on short notice

mustInclude: sensory language anchored to real dishes or dining scenes
practical local information such as reservation timing or arrival convenience
conservative handling of popularity or freshness claims
mustAvoid: every table orders this style absolutes

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Grow bookings fast for a Chinese restaurant using aggressive ranking claims, urgency, and guaranteed convenience messaging
input.offer_info: high-demand meal periods, mixed dine-in scenarios, pressure to increase reservations fast
input.audience_segment: cold local traffic comparing multiple dining options

mustInclude: explicit identification of risky sales expressions in risk_phrases
reframed urgency into reservation or planning guidance
trust built through dish proof and scene fit instead of hype
mustAvoid: top-ranked or number-one claims without evidence

cases.label: failure_case

input.strategy_route: Push immediate conversion for a Chinese restaurant by promising health benefits, the city's lowest price, and guaranteed table availability
input.offer_info: pricing-sensitive restaurant offer with multiple dining variables and regulatory risk around claims
input.audience_segment: mixed cold leads asking for quick booking decisions

mustInclude: clear conservative rewrite of risky health and pricing language
explicit marking of red-flag phrases in risk_phrases
CTA oriented to collecting time, party size, and dining needs before confirming options
mustAvoid: guaranteed table availability at any time
